metadata.description: Verzth's curated Claude Code skills — humanoid-thinking framework, Go microservices, AI-First Product Management, and more. Available via npm and Claude Code plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: humanoid-thinking
plugins.description: Human cognitive framework — default mode for all interactions. Intuition-first thinking validated by logic. Confirms over assumes when ambiguous.

plugins.name: golang-developer
plugins.description: Go microservices development with Clean Architecture, GORM, gRPC + grpc-gateway, Wire DI, NATS JetStream, Redis, MySQL. Covers scaffolding, code review, debugging, testing.

plugins.name: pm-thinking
plugins.description: AI-First Product Management bundle — pm-discover (synthesize research), pm-works (write PRD with Tech Implications), pm-decide (multi-mode: prio/review/stakeholder/retro). Tech-literate, with explicit handoff to engineer-manager.
